mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_NOTICE (NOTICE_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, VIEW_COUNT, IS_PINNED, CREATED_AT) VALUES (SEQ_LQ_NOTICE_PK.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content}, 0, #{isPinned}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LQ_NOTICE ORDER BY IS_PINNED DESC, CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_NOTICE SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
